Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: v1.2.1: Fix AI provider not switching when changed via main menu while chat panel is open

English.Keywords: HTML editor, AI code generator, web development, WYSIWYG, Emmet, local LLM, Ollama, desktop HTML editor, AI HTML, code editor
English.Char_Desc_45: AI-powered desktop HTML editor for Windows
English.Char_Desc_80: AI-powered HTML editor with 4 AI providers, 30+ templates, and Emmet support
English.Char_Desc_250: VibeFront is a desktop HTML editor that accelerates web development with AI. Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and local LLMs. 30+ templates, image-to-HTML conversion, Emmet expansion, responsive preview, dark/light theme. Buy once, no subscription.
English.Char_Desc_450: VibeFront is a desktop HTML editor that dramatically accelerates web development with the power of AI. Supports 4 AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, local LLMs via Ollama/LM Studio). Features include 30+ built-in templates, image-to-HTML conversion, side-by-side WYSIWYG and code editing, Emmet expansion, responsive preview at 4 breakpoints, file explorer with drag-and-drop tag insertion, dark/light theme, and multi-encoding support. Buy once, use forever — no subscription required.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
VibeFront is a desktop HTML editor that dramatically accelerates web development with the power of AI.
AI-Powered HTML Generation: Supports 4 AI providers — OpenAI, Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), and local LLMs (Ollama / LM Studio). Describe what you need in the chat panel, and VibeFront generates complete HTML from 30+ built-in templates: landing pages, contact forms, pricing tables, FAQ sections, and more.
Image-to-HTML Conversion: Drag and drop a screenshot or design mockup, and AI converts it into clean HTML and CSS. Reproduce any design in seconds.
Professional Code Editor: Side-by-side WYSIWYG visual editor (WebView2 + Tiptap) and code editor (AvalonEdit). Emmet expansion support — type div>ul>li*3, press Tab to expand instantly. HTML syntax highlighting and code completion. Click text in preview to auto-jump to the corresponding source code.
Responsive Preview: Preview at 4 breakpoints — Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), Desktop (1200px), and Full width. Test responsive layouts without a real device.
File Explorer: Drag files from the side panel directly into your code. Automatically inserts img, a, link, or script tags with correct relative paths.
Dark / Light Theme: Switch between dark mode and light mode instantly. Freely dock, float, and rearrange panels.
Multi-Encoding Support: Auto-detects UTF-8, UTF-8 BOM, Shift-JIS, EUC-JP, and UTF-16.
Buy Once, No Subscription: Pay once and use forever. No monthly fees. Use local LLMs (Ollama / LM Studio) for completely free, fully offline AI — no API key required.
